text: PACIFIC CROSS ADVISOR TRAINING 2025
Your Complete Guide to Blue Royale & FlexiShield Insurance Products
At 1.79% insurance penetration vs 6.2% OECD average, the Philippines has one of the lowest coverage rates in Asia. 94 million Filipinos are uninsured. This is your opportunity to make a difference.
THE PHILIPPINE INSURANCE REALITY
WHO NEEDS INSURANCE?
Single Young Professionals (18-30): No safety net, high risk tolerance
New Couples / DINK (25-40): Growing responsibilities, dual income
Growing Families (30-50): Kids, mortgages, maximum exposure
OFWs & Expats (35-55): Building abroad, protecting home
Pre-Retirees (50-60): Health concerns, legacy planning
Senior Citizens (60+): Medical needs, limited options
PRODUCT OVERVIEW
BLUE ROYALE: Your Global Health Shield
The flagship worldwide medical dollar plan offering maximum flexibility and comprehensive coverage anywhere in the world.
KEY BENEFIT: Freedom to choose ANY hospital, ANY doctor, ANYWHERE in the world. No network restrictions.
BLUE ROYALE PREMIUMS (Annual, USD with Travel+)
BLUE ROYALE CORE BENEFITS
Worldwide Coverage: Get treated anywhere, from Manila to New York
Freedom of Choice: Any hospital, clinic, pharmacy, or doctor
Travel+ Included: COVID-19 coverage, emergency evacuation, repatriation
Maternity Coverage: Childbirth and newborn benefits included
No Medical Exam Required: Simple application, no blood tests
24/7 Telemedicine: Video consultations with licensed doctors
Mental Health Support: Telehealth mental health first-aid
Coverage to Age 100: Extended protection for seniors
FLEXISHIELD: Your HMO's Power-Up
A second-layer medical plan designed to complement existing HMO coverage. Think of it as adding PHP 2 Million of protection on top of your HMO.
FLEXISHIELD SAVINGS: Because HMO pays first, FlexiShield premiums are significantly lower than standalone plans with similar coverage.
PRODUCT COMPARISON
COMMON MISCONCEPTIONS
MYTH: 'Insurance is only for old people' - REALITY: Premiums are CHEAPER when young and healthy.
MYTH: 'Company HMO is enough' - REALITY: HMO caps at PHP 100K-500K. Major illness costs PHP 500K-5M+.
MYTH: 'I'm healthy, I don't need it' - REALITY: Prevention beats cure. Get covered while healthy.
MYTH: 'Insurance is a waste of money' - REALITY: Car insurance is mandatory. Health insurance = family protection.
OBJECTION HANDLING
"I can't afford it"
Response: 'I hear you. But can you afford PHP 500,000 for cancer treatment? We have plans starting at PHP 600/month.'
"I'm healthy, I don't need it"
Response: 'That's exactly when to get it! Premiums are cheaper when you're healthy AND you're covered before issues arise.'
"Insurance agents are scammers"
Response: 'I understand the concern. That's why I'm here to educate, not pressure. No decision today is fine.'
THE PERFECT PRESENTATION FLOW
RAPPORT BUILDING (2-3 min): Find common ground. Be human.
PAIN POINT DISCOVERY (3-5 min): Let THEM identify the problem.
SOLUTION INTRODUCTION (5-10 min): Sell the RIGHT product for their situation.
OBJECTION HANDLING: Listen, empathize, reframe, address.
CLOSE & NEXT STEPS: 'Shall we start the application today?'
WHAT MAKES A GREAT ADVISOR
EDUCATOR, NOT SALESPERSON: Help clients understand, don't pressure them.
SOLUTIONS-FOCUSED: Find the RIGHT product for their situation.
LONG-TERM RELATIONSHIP: Insurance is a 10-30 year commitment.
CONTINUOUS LEARNING: Products change, laws evolve. Stay updated.
ETHICAL PRACTICE: Full disclosure always. No hidden exclusions.
GENUINE CARE: You sleep better knowing families are protected.
THE BIGGER PICTURE
As Pacific Cross advisors, we're not just selling insurance. We're building a safer Philippines.
VISION 2030: Imagine Philippines with 10% insurance penetration. Every family has basic health coverage. Hospital bills don't cause bankruptcy.
THE RIPPLE EFFECT
Protected family = breadwinner works stress-free
Kids stay in school = better education outcomes
Savings protected = wealth building starts
Healthcare accessible = longer productive lives
Protected citizens = stronger economy
Every policy sold is one more family protected. One more step toward the vision. Your success = Pacific Cross success = Philippines success.
